dsp_disclaimer: DSP usage percentages are based on the Helix firmware 3.80 specification. Actual values may vary based on model complexity and effect parameters. Mono and stereo modes have different DSP loads.

blocks.name: Asheville Pattrn
blocks.description: This is the Asheville Pattrn effect block for the HX Stomp.

parameters.name: Rate
parameters.description: Controls the speed of the modulation effect.

parameters.name: Pattern
parameters.description: Controls the pattern of the effect.

parameters.name: Envelope
parameters.description: Controls the envelope of the effect.

parameters.name: Voice
parameters.description: Controls the voice of the effect.

parameters.name: Mix
parameters.description: Blends the dry (unprocessed) and wet (processed) signals.

parameters.name: Output
parameters.description: Sets the output level of the effect.

parameters.name: Drive
parameters.description: Controls the amount of overdrive, distortion, or gain applied to the signal.

parameters.name: Direction
parameters.description: Controls the direction of the effect.

parameters.name: LFO
parameters.description: Controls the lfo of the effect.

parameters.name: Spread
parameters.description: Controls the spread of the effect.

parameters.name: Level1
parameters.description: Controls the level1 of the effect.

parameters.name: Level2
parameters.description: Controls the level2 of the effect.

parameters.name: Level3
parameters.description: Controls the level3 of the effect.

parameters.name: Level4
parameters.description: Controls the level4 of the effect.

parameters.name: Level5
parameters.description: Controls the level5 of the effect.

parameters.name: Level6
parameters.description: Controls the level6 of the effect.

parameters.name: Level7
parameters.description: Controls the level7 of the effect.

parameters.name: Level8
parameters.description: Controls the level8 of the effect.

parameters.name: Note Sync
parameters.description: Controls the note sync of the effect.

parameters.name: Tempo Sync
parameters.description: Controls the tempo sync of the effect.

parameters.name: Note Sync 2
parameters.description: Controls the note sync 2 of the effect.

parameters.name: Tempo Sync 2
parameters.description: Controls the tempo sync 2 of the effect.

blocks.name: Auto Filter
blocks.description: This is the Auto Filter effect block for the HX Stomp.

parameters.name: Mode
parameters.description: Controls the mode of the effect.

parameters.name: Filter Gain
parameters.description: Controls the filter gain of the effect.

parameters.name: Filter Q
parameters.description: Controls the filter q of the effect.

parameters.name: Sensitivity
parameters.description: Controls the sensitivity of the effect.

parameters.name: Attack
parameters.description: Controls how quickly the effect responds to incoming signal.

parameters.name: Decay
parameters.description: Controls how long the reverb tail sustains before fading to silence.

parameters.name: Frequency
parameters.description: Sets the center frequency of the filter or effect.

parameters.name: Freq Depth
parameters.description: Controls the freq depth of the effect.

parameters.name: Direction
parameters.description: Controls the direction of the effect.

parameters.name: Mix
parameters.description: Blends the dry (unprocessed) and wet (processed) signals.

parameters.name: Level
parameters.description: Sets the overall output level of the block.
